full_text:
Chen Jiao (Jibi) 陳矯 (季弼)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Jiao (陳矯), styledJibi (季弼), was born in Dongyang county Guangling (Presently Xuyi in Jiangsu Province). Known as a righteous, happy yet calm person. Highly respected governor. Chen Jiao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Chen Jiao lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
